title: Failed automations
excerpt:
I have automations that stopped working w.o. any proper explanation. 
According to the logic everything should have worked well, and I also verified that there were no server issues on Monday.com side, so I am a bit baff…

posts.author: amitt (amit)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have automations that stopped working w.o. any proper explanation.
According to the logic everything should have worked well, and I also verified that there were no server issues on Monday.com side, so I am a bit baffled what’s going on.
In addition, can we somehow be notified of cases like it? Currently the users are pointing at problems, which is not ideal.

image1475×808 56.4 KB

posts.author: amitt (amit)
posts.cookedHtml: Monday.com updated they had an issue yesterday.

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
